description: Style NoteAccessorise your outfit with fabulous costume jewellery from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece!Product DetailsBlack and grey beaded, ten strands necklace that culminates at a metal pendant with a lobster claspMaterial and CareGlass and poth beads with brass pendant with nickel polishWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of chain: 21 cm
